---
name: bugScan
description: scan the application for bugs and document them, plan fixes
argument-hint: scan the application
tools: ['vscode', 'read', 'agent', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---
scan the code base for bugs, if bug are found create document spefying what would fix the issue
